/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libturtlesim_custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libturtlesim_custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/turtlesim_custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/turtlesim_custom_msgs/msg/vel__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/turtlesim_custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/turtlesim_custom_msgs/srv/velocity__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/turtlesim_custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/turtlesim_custom_msgs/srv/average__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/turtlesim_custom_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/turtlesim_custom_msgs/srv/threshold__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/ubuntu/ros_workspace/build/turtlesim_custom_msgs:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libturtlesim_custom_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
